sentences.arabic: اسْتَأْجَرْتُ فَلُوكَةً مَعَ صَدِيقِي لِلتَّجْدِيفِ عَلَى نَهْرِ النِّيلِ.
sentences.translation: Iznajmio sam feluku s prijateljem da se vozimo po rijeci Nil.
sentences.translationEn: I hired a felucca with my friend to sail on the River Nile.

sentences.arabic: صَعِدْنَا إِلَى الْقَارِبِ عِنْدَ الْغُرُوبِ وَأَبْحَرَ بِنَا الرَّيِّسُ بِهُدُوءٍ.
sentences.translation: Ukrcali smo se u čamac u zalasku sunca i kapetan nas je mirno odvezao.
sentences.translationEn: We boarded the boat at sunset and the captain sailed us gently along.

sentences.translation: Vjetar je bio lagan a rijeka mirna.
sentences.translationEn: The wind was light and the river was calm.

sentences.arabic: رَأَيْنَا الْمَعَابِدَ وَالنُّصُبَ التَّذْكَارِيَّةَ عَلَى الضَّفَّتَيْنِ.
sentences.translation: Vidjeli smo hramove i spomenike na obje obale.
sentences.translationEn: We saw temples and monuments on both banks.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الرِّحْلَةُ فِي الْفَلُوكَةِ مِنْ أَجْمَلِ تَجَارِبِ رِحْلَتِي.
sentences.translation: Vožnja felukom bila je jedno od najljepših iskustava mog putovanja.
sentences.translationEn: The felucca ride was one of the most beautiful experiences of my trip.
